visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a grey t-shirt, stands in an indoor room with a desk and window blinds behind her. She initially holds her hands together in a prayer-like gesture with a concerned expression. She then pulls the center of her shirt toward the camera to display a large, dark circular design that resembles a wet stain, clarifying it is part of the garment's aesthetic. Small text boxes with social media comments appear on the screen. (2) The woman picks up a large brown paper shopping bag. She pulls out a grey baseball cap and puts it on, adjusting her hair. Next, she retrieves a large Hello Kitty plush head and a white Hello Kitty cosmetic pouch with a prominent red bow, displaying them enthusiastically to the lens while smiling. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the textures of the items. (3) The woman proceeds to show a series of smaller products in quick succession: an eyelash curler which she demonstrates on her eye, a red jelly snack pack, and a purple volcanic stone oil-removing tool which she rolls across her forehead and cheek to show the matte effect. She then holds up several 9wishes skincare products, including a serum and a sunstick. Finally, she applies a white tone-up cream to her left arm, rubbing it in to show a brightening contrast compared to her right arm, posing with both hands near her face at the end.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國人來澄清一下. [Variety]: 抱歉. (2) [Subtitle]: 真是包意思. (3) [Subtitle]: 這件衣服真的沒有沾到水. (4) [Slogan]: 上次回韓國到底買了什麼?. (5) [Variety]: Y2K you know?. (6) [Subtitle]: 在韓國DAISO買很多. (7) [Subtitle]: 這是部分睫毛夾. (8) [Subtitle]: 不是蜜粉，可以去油的石頭. (9) [Subtitle]: 解酒丸. (10) [Subtitle]: 假腳甲. (11) [Subtitle]: 從這邊是OL買的. (12) [Logo]: 9wishes. (13) [Subtitle]: 這款同時有防曬跟提亮膚色的功能. (14) [Variety]: 如何?. (15) [Variety]: 🤣🤣🤣.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, wavy dark brown hair, fair skin, wearing a simple grey short-sleeved t-shirt and later a grey baseball cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room featuring a white desk with various small items, green tissues, and a window covered by horizontal beige blinds.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaking Korean begins immediately over an upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM. A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect plays during the opening transition as she explains the shirt design. (2) As she reaches for the shopping bag, the crinkling of thick paper is audible. A bright 'pop' sound effect triggers as the Hello Kitty plush is revealed, followed by a 'ding' chime when the pouch is shown. The speech rate remains consistently fast and enthusiastic. (3) During the product review, a mechanical 'click' sound accompanies the use of the eyelash curler. A soft 'psh' or rubbing sound effect is layered over the volcanic stone demonstration. Multiple 'ding' sounds punctuate the appearance of skincare items. The music swells slightly in volume during the final arm cream demonstration, concluding with a celebratory vocal tone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Misunderstanding Clarification -> Item Introduction -> Demonstration -> Result Display
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and beauty haul vlog where the creator first clarifies a fashion-related misunderstanding regarding her 'wet-look' shirt design and then proceeds to showcase various trendy items purchased in South Korea, specifically from Musinsa, Daiso, and Olive Young, culminating in a product demonstration of a tone-up cream.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically demonstrates the application and immediate results of 9wishes skincare products, highlighting their features with on-screen text.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Fast-paced social media editing style with heavy use of sound effects and text overlays to maintain high engagement.
